title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta discusses production evaluation approaches for autonomous AI agents that go beyond offline benchmarks. The talk covers continuous evaluation pipelines, online vs offline evaluation architectures, human-in-the-loop systems, and methods for detecting drift and hallucinations in agentic workflows at scale.
writeup: Nishant Gupta of Meta Superintelligence Labs presents production evaluation methods for autonomous AI agents, arguing that offline benchmarks alone do not capture agent behavior in deployment. The talk contrasts online and offline evaluation architectures, covers continuous evaluation pipelines, and describes where human-in-the-loop review fits. Concrete takeaways include techniques for detecting drift and hallucinations in agentic workflows at scale, with attention to tool use, multi-step execution, and observability.
